ddls:
CREATE TABLE "crypto_currencies" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crypto currency */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the crypto currency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol used for the crypto currency */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Current rank of the crypto currency based on market cap */,
  "price_usd" REAL /* Price of the crypto currency in USD */,
  "price_btc" REAL /* Price of the crypto currency in BTC */,
  "24h_volume_usd" REAL /* 24-hour trading volume in USD */,
  "market_cap_usd" REAL /* Market capitalization in USD */,
  "available_supply" REAL /* Available supply of the crypto currency */,
  "total_supply" REAL /* Total supply of the crypto currency */,
  "max_supply" REAL /* Maximum supply of the crypto currency */,
  "percent_change_1h" REAL /* Percentage change in the last hour */,
  "percent_change_24h" REAL /* Percentage change in the last 24 hours */,
  "percent_change_7d" REAL /* Percentage change in the last 7 days */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Time when the data was last updated */,
  "price_inr" REAL /* Price of the crypto currency in INR */,
  "24h_volume_inr" REAL /* 24-hour trading volume in INR */,
  "market_cap_inr" REAL /* Market capitalization in INR */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the crypto currency was first added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the crypto currency data was last updated */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Consensus algorithm used by the crypto currency */,
  "block_time" INTEGER /* Average time to mine a new block */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the official website of the crypto currency */,
  "whitepaper_url" TEXT /* URL to the whitepaper of the crypto currency */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the crypto currency */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the logo of the crypto currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crypto currency */,
  "price_usd" REAL /* Price of the crypto currency in USD */,
  "price_btc" REAL /* Price of the crypto currency in BTC */,
  "24h_volume_usd" REAL /* 24-hour trading volume in USD */,
  "market_cap_usd" REAL /* Market capitalization in USD */,
  "available_supply" REAL /* Available supply of the crypto currency */,
  "total_supply" REAL /* Total supply of the crypto currency */,
  "max_supply" REAL /* Maximum supply of the crypto currency */,
  "percent_change_1h" REAL /* Percentage change in the last hour */,
  "percent_change_24h" REAL /* Percentage change in the last 24 hours */,
  "percent_change_7d" REAL /* Percentage change in the last 7 days */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Time when the market data was last updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the market data entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the market data entry was last updated */,
  "volume_btc" REAL /* 24-hour trading volume in BTC */,
  "volume_inr" REAL /* 24-hour trading volume in INR */,
  "market_cap_inr" REAL /* Market capitalization in INR */,
  "price_eur" REAL /* Price of the crypto currency in EUR */,
  "volume_eur" REAL /* 24-hour trading volume in EUR */,
  "market_cap_eur" REAL /* Market capitalization in EUR */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES crypto_currencies ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical price entry */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crypto currency */,
  "price_usd" REAL /* Price of the crypto currency in USD */,
  "price_btc" REAL /* Price of the crypto currency in BTC */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the price was recorded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the historical price entry was created */,
  "price_eur" REAL /* Price of the crypto currency in EUR */,
  "price_inr" REAL /* Price of the crypto currency in INR */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_history_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES crypto_currencies ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "volume_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical volume entry */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crypto currency */,
  "24h_volume_usd" REAL /* 24-hour trading volume in USD */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the volume was recorded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the historical volume entry was created */,
  "volume_btc" REAL /* 24-hour trading volume in BTC */,
  "volume_inr" REAL /* 24-hour trading volume in INR */,
  "volume_eur" REAL /* 24-hour trading volume in EUR */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_volume_history_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES crypto_currencies ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_cap_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical market cap entry */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crypto currency */,
  "market_cap_usd" REAL /* Market capitalization in USD */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the market cap was recorded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the historical market cap entry was created */,
  "market_cap_inr" REAL /* Market capitalization in INR */,
  "market_cap_eur" REAL /* Market capitalization in EUR */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_cap_history_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES crypto_currencies ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supply_data" (
  "supply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supply data entry */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crypto currency */,
  "available_supply" REAL /* Available supply of the crypto currency */,
  "total_supply" REAL /* Total supply of the crypto currency */,
  "max_supply" REAL /* Maximum supply of the crypto currency */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the supply data was recorded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the supply data entry was created */,
  "burned_supply" REAL /* Amount of the crypto currency that has been burned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supply_data_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES crypto_currencies ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crypto currency being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the crypto currency data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the crypto currency data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log entry was created */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES crypto_currencies ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who set the alert */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crypto currency for the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price change, volume change) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, disabled) */,
  "last_triggered_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was last triggered */,
  "notification_channel" TEXT /* Channel for alert notifications (e.g., email, SMS, push notification) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES crypto_currencies ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crypto currency involved in the transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the transaction */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the crypto currency involved in the transaction */,
  "price_usd" REAL /* Price of the crypto currency in USD at the time of the transaction */,
  "price_btc" REAL /* Price of the crypto currency in BTC at the time of the transaction */,
  "price_inr" REAL /* Price of the crypto currency in INR at the time of the transaction */,
  "price_eur" REAL /* Price of the crypto currency in EUR at the time of the transaction */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES crypto_currencies ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crypto currency in the portfolio */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the crypto currency in the portfolio */,
  "average_cost" REAL /* Average cost of the crypto currency in the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the portfolio entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the portfolio entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES crypto_currencies ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crypto currency related to the news */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the news article */,
  "published_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the news article was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES crypto_currencies ("id")
)
